fields.name: application_date
fields.description: Date the account package was completed.

fields.name: trust_name
fields.description: Legal name of trust or estate.

fields.name: trust_type
fields.description: Revocable, irrevocable, testamentary, estate, charitable, special needs, or other.

fields.name: trust_tax_id_masked
fields.description: Masked trust EIN or tax identifier.

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.description: Governing state or country.

fields.name: grantor_names
fields.description: Grantors, settlors, or decedent names.

fields.name: trustee_names
fields.description: Trustees or personal representatives.

fields.name: authorized_signer_names
fields.description: Authorized account signers.

fields.name: beneficiary_names
fields.description: Named beneficiaries when present.

fields.name: fiduciary_powers
fields.description: Investment, distribution, borrowing, pledge, or other powers.

fields.name: investment_objective
fields.description: Investment objective or account purpose.

fields.name: risk_tolerance
fields.description: Conservative, moderate, aggressive, or stated risk profile.

fields.name: source_of_funds
fields.description: Source of initial funding.

fields.name: initial_deposit_amount
fields.description: Initial deposit or transfer amount.

fields.name: account_type_requested
fields.description: Trust brokerage, fiduciary checking, estate account, managed account, or other.

fields.name: tax_certification_status
fields.description: W-9, W-8, exempt, missing, or other tax certification status.

fields.name: beneficial_ownership_required
fields.description: Whether beneficial ownership certification is required or referenced.

fields.name: document_checklist
fields.description: Documents received or required.

fields.name: approval_status
fields.description: Approved, pending, rejected, conditional, or other.

fields.name: relationship_manager_name
fields.description: Advisor, banker, or relationship manager.

completeness_checklist.description: All required fields are present or explicitly null with low confidence when absent.
Each declared section was reviewed for extractable evidence.
Object array fields use their item_schema for consistent nested extraction.
